caption: Figure 1.2. Per capita GDP growth in 2020
description: A bar chart showing per capita GDP growth in 2020 for ASEAN countries. The chart shows negative growth for most countries, with the Philippines experiencing the largest decline at -10.7%, followed by Malaysia at -6.9%, Thailand at -6.4%, Cambodia at -4.4%, Singapore at -3.8%, Indonesia at -3.1%, and Lao PDR at -1.0%. Positive growth was recorded for Myanmar at 2.5%, Viet Nam at 2.0%, and Brunei Darussalam at 0.2%.
